verses.1: “Behold, my eye has seen all this.
verses.2: What you know, I know also.
verses.3: “Surely I would speak to the Almighty.
verses.4: But you are forgers of lies.
verses.5: Oh that you would be completely silent!
verses.7: Will you speak unrighteously for God,
verses.8: Will you show partiality to him?
verses.9: Is it good that he should search you out?
verses.11: Won’t his majesty make you afraid
verses.12: Your memorable sayings are proverbs of ashes.
verses.14: Why should I take my flesh in my teeth,
verses.16: This also will be my salvation,
verses.18: See now, I have set my cause in order.
verses.19: Who is he who will contend with me?
verses.20: “Only don’t do two things to me,
verses.21: withdraw your hand far from me,
verses.22: Then call, and I will answer,
verses.23: How many are my iniquities and sins?
verses.24: Why do you hide your face,
verses.25: Will you harass a driven leaf?
verses.26: For you write bitter things against me,
verses.27: You also put my feet in the stocks,
verses.28: though I am decaying like a rotten thing,
